plentry.pd:
Set the backup name, specify the ReplicaGroup, the backup path and other parameters.
GroupID Backup ReplicaGroup ID specified, the default is all ReplicaGroup. GroupID:1000 or GroupID:[1000, 1001]
GroupName Backup ReplicaGroup name is specified, the default is all ReplicaGroup. GroupName:"data1" or GroupName:["data1", "data2"]
Name Backup name, the default view all backups. Name:"backup-2014-1-1"
Path Backup path, the default configuration parameters for the specified backup path. The path supports wildcards(%g/%G: group name, %h/%H: host name, %s/%S:service name) Path:"/opt/sequoiadb/backup/%g"
IsSubDir The above path "Path" configuration parameters are specified for the backup path configuration parameters subdirectory, the default is false. IsSubDir:false
Prefix Backup prefix, supports wildcards(%g,%G,%h,%H,%s,%H), default is empty. Prefix:"%g_bk_"

section.title: Examples
section.p: Backup information called "backup-2014-1-1" delete the database.
